routes.bodyCue: desire converts to increased attentiveness to partner's spatial position and task pace
routes.attentionShift: threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses
routes.silencePattern: silence after partner speaks carries evaluative weight; duration encodes trust level
routes.objectInteraction: hands route feeling through handled objects before explicit explanation
routes.socialReading: Assumes silence means consent rather than tactical delay.
routes.ritualDeviation: small ritual timing deviations surface interior strain without explicit thesis
routes.environmentalPressureContact: weather, distance, and witness placement physically constrain available speech
